title: Document guides on ExpatCopilot
intro: These guides help you translate, legalise, and prepare paperwork before deadlines pile up.

items.reason: Plan certified translations early so visas, housing, and gemeente steps are not blocked.
Understand when an apostille is required and how to obtain one in time.
See how foreign documents are legalised for Dutch authorities when an apostille alone is not enough.

disclosure: These are editorial guides on this site, not paid placements.
